app.title: Dr. Zarak AI-Assisted Family Health Hub
app.subtitle: Clear, calm ADHD & mental health support

summary.title: Live summary
summary.placeholder: As you chat, a brief summary will appear here.

tips.title: Tips for best results
tips.tip1: Speak naturally and pause when you want a response.
tips.tip2: Use the mood check-in to set the tone you need.
tips.tip3: Use text chat for quick questions.

practice.title: Conversation practice
practice.subtitle: Practice what to say when it's hard to find words.
practice.contextPlaceholder: Who are you talking to and what's happening?
practice.goalPlaceholder: E.g., I need some space today, but I still care about you.

crisis.title: Need immediate help?
crisis.text: If you're in crisis, please reach out to emergency services or a crisis helpline.

telehealth.title: Telehealth Consultation
telehealth.description: Schedule a private consultation with Dr. Zarak for personalized care
